quoteFirst: The theatre was handed over to us on Sunday morning; on Monday night at a quarter-past eight the curtain rose on ‘Much Ado,’ mounted and set with our Lyceum effects,—scenery, properties, company,—and fell at
title:
Henry Irving's Impressions of America
Narrated in a Series of Sketches, Chronicles, and Conversations
author: Hatton, Joseph, 1841-1907
